en_source: The moment passed.\nWhat remained was order.
Winter is honest.\nSo was your run.
The stars aligned for a moment.\nYou noticed.
The distance closed.\nTime did not.
The world’s rules stood firm.\n And the signal of possibility was real.
The path closed quietly.\nYou were already through.
Nothing changed.\nOnly your position did.
Not luck.\nAlignment.
The moment passed.\nThe record remains.
The outcome didn’t change.\nStill, you moved forward.
The output didn’t change.\nBut you reached a new level.
The ending was the same.\nBut the one who reached it had changed.
The destination is the same\n—but you’re no longer the traveler you once were.
Light fell evenly, ,\nand every shadow vanished.
The wind fell silent.\nand everything returned to where it belonged.
A moment of silence.\nThe world steadied its breath.
The record is etched deep in the sand—\nbeyond the reach of the wind.
Harmony was restored.\nEverything had been for this moment.
Time slipped by in silence,\ntucked away in the corners of memory.
The sky shifted in color,\nand one story came to its end.
